vectors.name: single_key_default_sighash
vectors.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x20; transaction, P2MR leaf, and P2MRSighash serialization are computed by this standalone Python generator without qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.
vectors.dataSigProvenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fills 0x20, 0x21, and 0x22; data signature hashes, P2MR leaf commitments, and ADDPQC scripts are serialized independently without qbit signing, script, or P2MR helpers.

dataSigAdd.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fills 0x20, 0x21, and 0x22; dataSigHash is computed independently as a QbitDataSigPQC tagged hash, and P2MR scriptPubKeys commit to independently serialized ADDPQC leaf scripts.

checkSigAdd.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x20; the CHECKSIGADD leaf, transaction, and P2MRSighash serialization are computed independently without qbit wallet, signing, script, or P2MR helpers.

vectors.name: single_key_sighash_none
vectors.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x21; transaction, P2MR leaf, and P2MRSighash serialization are computed by this standalone Python generator without qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.

vectors.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x22; transaction, P2MR leaf, and P2MRSighash serialization are computed by this standalone Python generator without qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.

vectors.name: single_key_sighash_single_anyonecanpay
vectors.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x25; transaction, P2MR leaf, and P2MRSighash serialization are computed by this standalone Python generator without qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.

vectors.name: single_key_default_sighash_annex_present
vectors.provenance: Generated from deterministic libbitcoinpqc seed 0x21 plus an independent Python P2MR serializer; the vector signs the manually computed annex-present P2MRSighash digest with libbitcoinpqc and does not use qbit wallet/signing/sighash helpers.

vectors.name: single_key_sighash_single_missing_first
vectors.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x26; missing-output SIGHASH_SINGLE vectors intentionally omit p2mrSigMsg and p2mrSighash because P2MR rejects before defining a digest.

vectors.name: single_key_sighash_single_missing_beyond
vectors.provenance: Generated by contrib/devtools/generate-p2mr-pqc-witness-vectors.py using deterministic libbitcoinpqc random_data fill 0x27; missing-output SIGHASH_SINGLE vectors intentionally omit p2mrSigMsg and p2mrSighash because P2MR rejects before defining a digest.

vectors.name: single_key_leading_codesep
